description_long: This is a military tank with a low, angular hull and a large, centrally mounted turret featuring a long-barreled main cannon. The vehicle is painted in a matte olive drab color, with white identification markings including the number '206' on the turret sides and a white stripe running along the turret. The tank has six large road wheels on each side, connected by visible suspension components, and is equipped with continuous metal tracks for mobility. The upper hull and turret are both sloped, suggesting reinforced armor, and there are additional details such as hatches, periscopes, and a radio antenna on the turret. The front and rear views show the tank's robust, armored profile, while the side views highlight the length of the cannon and the arrangement of the running gear.
description: A matte olive drab military tank with a large turret, long cannon, and six road wheels per side, featuring white markings and sloped armor.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tank's sloped glacis plate, centrally mounted cannon, and robust tracks.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the cannon, six road wheels, white '206' marking, and turret stripe.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the turret, engine deck, and rear armor details.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the '206' marking and white stripe visible, as well as the running gear.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with visibly thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid matte olive drab with white stripes and numbers; no camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White number '206' and a white stripe on both sides of the turret.
